creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

My RELENG_8 find does not have an -rm option.  It does have a -delete option, 
but that is often not sufficient.  The advantage of using the xargs approach 
is that xargs is able to handle very large file lists that could overflow 
find ... -delete. 

I'm inclined not to add this check unless there's a guarantee that all versions 
of find(1) that are currently supported can handle thousands of files with 
the -delete option.
